----
title: Slider Adder
marimo-version: 0.13.2
filters:
- marimo-team/marimo
---

```python {.marimo}
import marimo as mo

mo.md(
    """
    # Add to a slider value

    Pick a number on the slider, choose how much to add, and see the sum update instantly.
    """
)
```

```python {.marimo}
slider = mo.ui.slider(1, 10)
mo.md("Choose a value: {slider}")
```

```python {.marimo}
mo.md(f"**Sum:** {base_number} + {increment.value} = **{base_number + increment.value}**"),
```
